channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: From gifting a hat to tossing them onto the rink, a history of hat tricks in sports
item.description: Hat tricks have a rich history in hockey, but it didn't start there. For NPR's Word of the Week, we trace the term's some 150-year-history and why it'...

item.title: Person detained in Nancy Guthrie case is released. And, Bondi testifies before House
item.description: Police have released a person taken in for questioning in connection with Nancy Guthrie's disappearance. And, AG Pam Bondi will testify before the Hou...

item.title: Shootings at school and home in British Columbia, Canada, leave 10 dead
item.description: A shooting at a school in British Columbia left seven people dead, while two more were found dead at a nearby home, authorities said. A woman who poli...

item.title: Pam Bondi to face questions from House lawmakers about her helm of the DOJ
item.description: The attorney general's appearance before the House Judiciary Committee comes one year into her tenure, a period marked by a striking departure from tr...

item.title: Trump's EPA plans to end a key climate pollution regulation
item.description: The Environmental Protection Agency is eliminating a Clean Air Act finding from 2009 that is the basis for much of the federal government's actions to...

item.title: Bondi set to testify at House hearing amid scrutiny over Epstein files
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi is set to field questions about the Justice Department's handling of the Epstein files.

item.title: Tumbler Ridge mass shooting: What we know so far
item.description: Nine people have been killed and 25 injured in the shootings at a school and home in a rural community in western Canada.

item.title: Netanyahu to meet Trump as Iran nuclear talks reach critical stage
item.description: Israel's PM is expected to press Trump to pursue a deal that would also cut Iran's ballistic missile programme and support for armed groups.

item.title: FAA closes airspace around El Paso, Texas, for 10 days, grounding all flights
A timeline of Nancy Guthrie's disappearance as search stretches on
item.description: Savannah's Guthrie's mom, Nancy Guthrie, was reported missing Feb. 1, and authorities have still not identified a possible suspect.

item.title: Man who says he was person of interest in Nancy Guthrie's abduction released
item.description: Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show co-host Savannah Guthrie, was reported missing on Feb. 1 and ransom notes were being investigated.

item.title: Letters found in home show messages between WWII soldier, future wife
item.description: The letters by William Raymond Whittaker and Jane Dean were found in a Nashville home that had belonged to Jane and her siblings.

item.title: What we know about the abduction of Savannah Guthrie's mother
item.description: It's been days since 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie disappeared in the middle of night from her home in Arizona.

item.title: Ghana declares Wednesday 'Fugu Day' to promote traditional outfit after online mockery
item.description: The iconic attire has been trending online for days following the banter between Ghanaians and Zambians.

item.title: Investigators searching a location in Arizona in disappearance of Nancy Guthrie
item.description: Officials say a person has been detained for questioning in the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie. The Pima County Sheriff’s Department said in a stateme...

item.title: FAA halts all flights into and out of El Paso for 10 days for "security reasons"
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration has halted all flights into and out of El Paso until very late on Feb. 20 for what it calls "special security reas...

item.title: UK will bolster troops in Norway to counter Russian threat
item.description: British troops in Norway will rise from 1,000 to 2,000 to address Russia's "greatest" threat since the Cold War.

item.title: FBI search of Georgia election offices relied on years-old claims of fraud, affidavit shows
